title: sphaerostephanos arbuscula
intro: Sphaerostephanos arbuscula, a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta. Sphaerostephanos arbuscula has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and inflammation due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic effects. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities, which can help protect against cell damage and infections. In herbal preparations, Sphaerostephanos arbuscula is typically dried and crushed into powder, which can be used as a tea or added to traditional remedies.
